Visual diagnosis only. This layer proves whether Mini Cubism rendering is clean when the broken separated face layers are not visible.

neutral_visibility.policy: Auxiliary blink/open-mouth parts are hidden at neutral through Mini Cubism part_opacity_keyframes.

part_opacity_keyframes.purpose: hide helper/underpaint patches at neutral; reveal only during angle/gaze preview

neutral_repair.method: clip outside canonical alpha, recolor visible pixels to canonical RGB, patch missing neutral pixels into existing semantic source layers

roi_guided_semantic_remask.method: semantic owner-map underpaint transfer plus ROI-guided alpha remask from part_localization_template; no raw rectangular crop regeneration

clean_neutral_opacity_candidate.method: add neutral-hidden opacity keyframes for helper underpaint and face shadow layers

group_position_clean_candidate.method: apply 8065 group-level position deltas to 8066 clean-neutral layers

debug_policy.purpose: Confirm visual corruption comes from separated face/eye/mouth layers, not the Mini Cubism renderer.
